name: project-kickoff-quality
description: Tests output quality of project kickoff plans

criteria.name: has_requirement_count
criteria.check: output contains numbered requirements with total count

criteria.name: has_task_table
criteria.description: Plan includes structured task breakdown table
criteria.check: output contains task table with agent assignments and sizes

criteria.name: has_phases
criteria.description: Plan organizes work into execution phases
criteria.check: output contains Phase 1, Phase 2 etc with task assignments

criteria.name: has_dependencies
criteria.check: output contains dependency information (Depends On or sequential notation)

criteria.name: has_risks
criteria.description: Plan includes risk assessment with mitigations
criteria.check: output contains Risks section with mitigation plans

criteria.name: has_success_criteria
criteria.check: output contains Success Criteria with checkboxes

criteria.name: parallel_optimization
criteria.description: Plan uses parallel execution where possible
criteria.check: output indicates parallel tasks in at least one phase
